All listed paths live under the 'analysis/' directory
Files include INTEGRATION.md, landing-mockups.md, mid-lod.md, pitch-deck.md, PROGRESS.md, and README.md
Every entry uses the same three-key schema: project, path, root
No code symbols or content snippets are included
standouts: Includes both process/status files (PROGRESS.md, README.md) and substantive design/analysis files
Uses an absolute local filesystem root tied to a specific user directory
concerns: No metadata explaining why these six files are grouped in batch-004
No timestamps, checksums, or version identifiers
notes: This file is a simple allocation manifest registering six claude-ds analysis Markdown files for interpretive processing.
questions: What selection criteria define batch-004 versus other batches?

intention_signals: It appears to be trying to enumerate a curated set of claude-ds analysis/design documents so they can be interpreted, fused, or processed together.
